checks.interpretation: Ambient Python is not sufficient for Rich task admission.
Rich test collection is feasible when project dependencies and the attrs dev dependency are installed in an isolated environment.

dependency_observations.tox_policy: tox runs poetry install before pytest

claim_boundary: This is collect-only feasibility at the current Rich checkout, not no-op/reference task smoke.
It does not admit any R or W* task.
Historical base commits may have different dependency surfaces and still require per-task smoke.
next_required_step: Implement Rich task-admission smoke with isolated install commands that include project dependencies and attrs, then build Golden-Oracle verifiers for source-only W* candidates.
